subject: content(data): update project descriptions and tech stacks from repo docs
body:
Researched all 10 project repositories to update names, descriptions,
and tech stacks with accurate information from each repo's README and
package.json.

Key changes:
- Graphiki: added Dexie.js, Hugging Face to tech
- CanvaGrid: expanded description (28 export formats), added html-to-image, pdf-lib
- SyncTone: added tone-reveal mechanic detail, Zustand
- model-pear: expanded pricing/ROI description
- Sancio: refined progressive agreement-building description, added React Router
- Four Ems: minor description refinement
- budgy-ting: major update — cashflow forecasting, ML tags, ApexCharts, Hugging Face
- FuelHunt: added PostGIS, full-screen map detail
- repo-tor: added 6 views and role-based detail
- Chatty Chart: refined as sales presentation tool

Tags: data, content, projects
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: project-screenshots
Semver: patch
title: update project descriptions and tech stacks from repo docs
